feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /gpt/ - Gay Pokemon Thread
entry.content: post sexy male 'mons (and their trainers) here

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I just finished FFVII Remake. What the fuck happened at the end? I have no idea …
entry.content: I just finished FFVII Remake. What the fuck happened at the end? I have no idea who the hell this guy is or even really who the main bad guy was? They kept showing him but they never really explained his motivation. i don't even know what we were fighting about at the end. Lost me in that last Chapter. Is this explained in the original?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Behold the future of gaming in a non-physical copy world
entry.content: >Buy RE 8 Village for PS5 years ago on the PS store >Felt like playing it since I haven't played it in a while >Go into PS store to download it again >PS store acknowledges that I've bought the game in the past since it says add to library instead of just showing the price for the game >Attempt to download >PS store tells me I have to pay for the game again >Look up why it is making me pay for the game again >People with the same problem online say that since they've updated the game quiet a bit

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: From the leaks it sounds terrible, and is going about this storyline in too much…
entry.content: From the leaks it sounds terrible, and is going about this storyline in too much of a convoluted manner. It should have worked backwards with it being a soft reboot of everyone already existing in Battleworld, and it being a mystery to uncover of how they all ended up there. With Doctor Doom's characterization being of why should we accept the hand of fate given to us, when we have the power to alter it. That we can be our own gods, and make our own reality. It would play in perfectly to his hub

entry.title: /b/ Random: I want to sleep with my sister
entry.content: I don't expect much real advice from people on 4chan but I don't know where else to vent this. Whenever I fap, no matter what I'm looking at or thinking about in the beginning, I always end up on her Instagram to make me finish. I am genuinely super attracted to her, I can't help myself. She is so hot I can barely stand it. I would rather sleep with her than most other girls I know. I am aware of how fucked up it is and I always feel shame after cumming to her. Is this at all common? How concern

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: If you could have a video game character living in a house built into your torso…
entry.content: If you could have a video game character living in a house built into your torso, which would it be? They'd be shrunk down to a size proportional to around what I've shown in the image; and they would maintain their abilities from their home series. They teleport back into the home every 24 hours and will be teleported back home if they are more than 30 miles away from you. The home has no affects on the functions of your internal organs or anatomy. The character will maintain their personality

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Everything that you're worried about is going to be gone like that. The people t…
entry.content: Everything that you're worried about is going to be gone like that. The people that are criticizing you, they're going to be gone. You're going to be gone. All this hand-wringing, worry, and concern over, "How are people viewing me?" or, "Someone said something bad about me," and you get so upset about it, is wasted time and energy. Your only focus should be on getting better at what you're doing. Focus on what you're doing. Get better at what you're doing. Everything else is a complete waste of

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If you want to be great, you want to be the baddest mothafucka ever at what you …
entry.content: If you want to be great, you want to be the baddest mothafucka ever at what you do, you will be misunderstood by everybody because you're going to be so obsessed and so driven to get there. That's what it takes. It takes every second of your life. Anybody who says balance... yeah, balance is important for average people. But if you want to go to that edge where people do not like you, don't understand you, question everything you do, you've arrived.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Phone hardware has been good enough to be a computer for a while now, so where t…
entry.content: Phone hardware has been good enough to be a computer for a while now, so where the fuck are the docks? I would love to come home form work, slam my S26 into a dock with a keyboard, mouse, 24 inch monitor and just have everything in one device, or at least my phone replace laptops if Samsung would sell some GalaxyDock with a keyboard trackpad and a screen so I could live out of it when I'm not home.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You know what grinds my fucking gears pizza
entry.content: Margherita is the best one because every other topping sucks my dick. It wouldn't be this way if they diced the toppings but they don't. I bite into a slice that has jalapeño, red onion and pepperoni and I don't have sharp fangs like a feral animal so they don't cut through it, they just drag it all into my mouth so I've got this tiny bite of pizza along with a whole slice of jalapeño, a whole slice of red onion and a whole pepperoni. Just dice them. FUCK

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is this secure enough for Anons?
entry.content: Onionshare-cli --chat is pretty decent and offically supported by tor. OpenSSL is accessible and has post-quantum encryption for v3.5+. Raspberry pi 2w are still cheap (relative to silver/everyone is just poorer from inflation). All the steps I will build into a setup and run script/program. Users just set parameters in a config.txt file. Security is solved and handled by onionshare/tor plus openssl. User experience will be: > flash micro sd card > Start up and setup pi > download and Install th

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: You're a marine, one of Earth's toughest, hardened in combat and trained for act…
entry.content: You're a marine, one of Earth's toughest, hardened in combat and trained for action. Three years ago you assaulted a superior officer for ordering his soldiers to fire upon civilians. He and his body cast were shipped to Pearl Harbor, while you were transferred to Mars, home of the Union Aerospace Corporation. The UAC is a multi-planetary conglomerate with radioactive waste facilities on Mars and its two moons, Phobos and Deimos. With no action for fifty million miles, your day consisted of suck

entry.content: >work at IT help desk >customer submits a ticket that's too complicated >"After reviewing your request, we have determined that it requires Tier 2 support. We have forwarded your request to them, and they will be reaching out in due course with further assistance." >write "esculated" in the ticket notes >wait a day or so, then close the ticket >if the customer calls asking why their ticket was closed, tell them they filled out the form wrong and have to resubmit their ticket >usually by the time

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: What happened to 'adult' pop culture and music? There used to be bars and other …
entry.content: What happened to 'adult' pop culture and music? There used to be bars and other places for mature adults to socialize and meet each other. Even mid-sized towns usually had a bar aimed at this market, and not just 'dives.' There was an entire genre of pop music called 'adult contemporary' which was aimed at working-aged adults, eg: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ypb jIwbTR8c https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jJP mZFUDoi8 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oQ5 ZbpQvoEQ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Never Say Die! is the eighth album by British heavy metal band Black Sabbath, re…
entry.content: Never Say Die! is the eighth album by British heavy metal band Black Sabbath, released on Vertigo Records September 29, 1978. It was the last album with the original lineup before vocalist Ozzy Osbourne departed to launch a solo career. Osbourne was increasingly unfocused due to heavy substance abuse and resistant to the new material the band was working on. The album was recorded over the winter of 1977-78 in a Toronto, Canada studio that did not have suitable acoustics for the band's sound and

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: JESUS WAS A MACHINE
entry.content: Jesus Christ was not a supernatural being in the traditional sense, but a highly advanced cybernetic envoy sent from humanity's far future. Civilization probably had reached the brink of extinction after centuries of war and ecological collapse. The only remaining hope was to alter history by sending an artificial-human, hybrid/part biological, part machine, back to a pivotal point in human development. His "miracles" were actually demonstrations of technology so advanced that ancient observers

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Altogether, more than 2,000,000 people were killed in Belarus during the three …
entry.content: >Altogether, more than 2,000,000 people were killed in Belarus during the three years of Nazi occupation, around 25% of the region's population,[1][2] or even as high as 3,000,000 killed or 30% of the population,[3][4] with an estimation that 1 in 3 Belarusians died during WW2.[5] In total, on the territory of modern Belarus, more than 9,200 villages and settlements, and 682,000 buildings were destroyed and burned, with some settlements burned several times.[6] By the end of the war, Belarus had

entry.title: /g/ Technology: They replace the button you want with the microphone button
entry.content: They replace the button you'd normally click on with this. They put it wherever you'd usually click on. Whatever button (submit/search/send etc) you were meaning to click has been replaced with this one. They replace the button you wanted to click on with the microphone button. The microphone button is now in the spot where the button you had expected was before.
